steps.expression: async () => { const seed = Date.now(); const name = `Archive Feedback Agent ${seed}`; window.__agentArchiveFeedback = { name }; const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const modelEntry = settings.ok ? Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0) : undefined; const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; return window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name, systemPrompt: 'Verify archive feedback.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: [], modelRefOrNull }); }

async () => { const name = window.__agentArchiveFeedback?.name ?? ''; const result = await window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: name, tagFilter: '', archivedFilter: 'archived', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page: 1 }); return result.ok ? result.value.items.length : -1; }

() => { const summary = document.querySelector('.agent-actions-menu summary'); if (!(summary instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } summary.click(); return !Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.agent-menu-item')).some((node) => node.textContent?.includes('Edit agent')); }
() => { const card = document.querySelector('[data-agent-card-id]'); if (card instanceof HTMLElement) { card.click(); } }

steps.text: This agent is archived and read-only. Restore it to edit.

steps.expression: async () => { const name = window.__agentArchiveFeedback?.name ?? ''; const result = await window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: name, tagFilter: '', archivedFilter: 'active', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page: 1 }); return result.ok ? result.value.items.length : -1; }
